Selection

Each team consists of 11 players (no substitutes) with the following restrictions:

  • 1 Goalkeeper (GK)
  • 3 to 5 Defenders (DF)
  • 3 to 5 Midfielders (MF)
  • 1 to 3 Forwards (FW)

Draft

The draft will take place from Wednesday 3rd June 2026 to Wednesday 10th June 2026 inclusive. On each round every manager will choose a single player to join their team. Each manager should do their scouting in advance, so 1 or 2 rounds can be completed each day. The order will be randomly generated and will alternate on each round. For example, if there are 3 teams denoted A, B, C, the order will be: A-B-C-C-B-A ... The draft is completed as soon as all teams have 11 players. At the end of the draft all teams must comply with the selection restrictions.

Transfers

A manager can exchange one of their players for an unselected player on a first-come-first-served basis. There are no restrictions on the number of transfers allowed. Teams must comply with the selection restrictions at all times. Transfers can be submitted at any time after the draft is completed, and are immediately binding. However, ownership for the purpose of assigning points will only be transferred at the following times:

  • 13:00 BST, Thursday 11th June 2026 - Day of Mexico v South Africa
  • 13:00 BST, Thursday 18th June 2026 - Day of Czechia v South Africa
  • 13:00 BST, Wednesday 24th June 2026 - Day of Switzerland v Canada
  • 13:00 BST, Sunday 28th June 2026 - Day of first R32 match
  • 13:00 BST, Saturday 4th July 2026 - Day of first R16 match
  • 13:00 BST, Thursday 9th July 2026 - Day of first quarter-final
  • 13:00 BST, Tuesday 14th July 2026 - Day of first semi-final
  • 13:00 BST, Sunday 19th July 2026 - Day of final

A player transferred out less than 15 minutes before these times may not be transferred in by the same manager until at least 15 minutes after these times.

Points

Points are awarded to or deducted from players for the following events. These points are assigned to the team owning the player at the time of the event. Positions are determined by the list of players, not apparent playing position in a given match. FIFA World Cup 2026 official tournament reports are used to calculate points in all cases. No points are awarded or deducted for any events occurring during the Third place play-off.

Event GKDFMFFW
Goal (excl. Shootout) 10765
Assist 3333
Clean Sheet (Full Time *) 5400
Scored Penalty (Shootout) 3222
Penalty Save (incl. Shootout) 2101010
Own Goal -1-2-2-2
Missed/Saved Penalty (incl. Shootout) -2-2-2-2
Red Card -2-2-2-2

* Players must appear before Full Time to gain points.
